scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx @opennextjs/cloudflare build && npx wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.migrate:dev: npx wrangler d1 execute hotel-db --local --file migrations/0001_backup_tables.sql -y && npx wrangler d1 execute hotel-db --local --file migrations/0002_create_tables.sql -y && npx wrangler d1 execute hotel-db --local --file migrations/0003_restore_tables.sql -y
scripts.migrate:prod: npx wrangler d1 execute hotel-db --env production --remote --file migrations/0001_backup_tables.sql -y && npx wrangler d1 execute hotel-db --env production --remote --file migrations/0002_create_tables.sql -y && npx wrangler d1 execute hotel-db --env production --remote --file migrations/0003_restore_tables.sql -y
scripts.backup:deploy: npx wrangler deploy backup-worker.js --config wrangler.backup.jsonc --env production
scripts.backup:list: npx wrangler r2 object list rjk-db-backups
